chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI JCM NO. 05 of 2008 _____________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of Main Petition. 2. For hearing of O/A Ref. No. 24/2019. 3. For Orders on CMA No. 324/2021. 4. For Orders on O/A’s Ref. No. 32/2022. 5. For hearing of O/A’s Ref. No. 297/2009. 6. For hearing of O/A’s Ref. No. 04/2009. 7. For hearing of CMA No. 485/2010. 8. For hearing of CMA No. 518/2010. 9. For hearing of CMA No. 973/2010. 10. For Orders on CMA No. 36/2021. 11. For Orders on O/A’s Ref. No. 34/2024. 12. For Orders on CMA No. 3567/2025. 13. For Orders on O/A’s Ref. No. 37/2026. 14. For Orders on O/A’s Ref. No. 38/2026. 30.04.2026. Mr. Talha Javed, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Hussain Khan, Advocate for Intervenor. Mr. Mushtaque Ahmed Laghari, Official Assignee.......... Pursuant to Order dated 07.04.2026, learned counsel for the Petitioner has provided a concise Booklet which shows that all requisite formalities have been complied. There are no objections to grant of this Petition available on record, nor has anyone come forwarded with the same. Comments filed by Securities Exchange Commission of Pakistan also do not show any objection to the grant of this Petition, and the Official Assignee present in Court also shares the same view. It is further noted that in furtherance of Order dated 04.08.2008, the Official Assignee is to be appointed as the Official Liquidator, and shall have all powers as already stated in the said order. In view of hereof, there remains no impediment for granting of the instant Petition. Consequently, the Respondent Company is ordered to be wound-up and all consequent applicable legal and codal formalities are to be followed.

In view of hereof, there remains no impediment for granting of the instant Petition. Consequently, the Respondent Company is ordered to be wound-up and all consequent applicable legal and codal formalities are to be followed. Accordingly, the instant Petition is allowed. Petition Allowed. J U D G E Ayaz
